sub_groupings.name: Anemias and Red Blood Cell Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions affecting red blood cell production, function, or survival including inherited and acquired forms

sub_groupings.name: Neutropenia and White Blood Cell Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions characterized by abnormal white blood cell counts or function including congenital and acquired forms

sub_groupings.name: Lymphocyte and Immune Cell Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions affecting lymphocyte production/function including immunodeficiencies and lymphoproliferative diseases

sub_groupings.name: Platelet and Coagulation Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions affecting platelet function or number including acquired and congenital forms

sub_groupings.name: Bone Marrow and Hematopoietic Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions affecting bone marrow function and blood cell production including aplastic and hypoplastic conditions

sub_groupings.name: Hemolytic and Blood Group Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions characterized by abnormal red blood cell destruction or blood group abnormalities

sub_groupings.name: Hematologic Malignancies and Neoplasms
sub_groupings.description: Neoplastic conditions affecting blood-forming tissues and blood cells

sub_groupings.name: Hemophagocytic Syndromes and Inflammatory Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions with excessive immune activation and hemophagocytosis including genetic and acquired forms

sub_groupings.name: Congenital Hematologic Anomalies
sub_groupings.description: Hereditary conditions affecting blood cell structure or function

sub_groupings.name: Drug-Induced Hematologic Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions caused by medications affecting blood components or bone marrow function

sub_groupings.name: Other Hematologic Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Miscellaneous hematologic conditions not fitting other categories
